message:
fix: programmatic Graphviz graph construction + proper WASI init

Replace DOT string parsing (agmemread) with programmatic cgraph API
(agopen/agnode/agedge) to bypass missing flex/bison scanner. Fix WASI
runtime initialization (_start + proc_exit handling), implement proper
plugin registration (gvconfig_plugin_install_from_library), and correct
C stub function signatures that caused WASM indirect call traps.
